'''âth-h-l-ch''' ('''kathahlechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jealouse|jealouse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-h-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jealouse|jealouse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-h-l-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kathahlechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithahlechoko|thithahlechoko]] || [[word:jithahlechoko|jithahlechoko]] || [[word:shithahlechoko|shithahlechoko]] || [[word:kithahlechoko|kithahlechoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
